aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. The current site lacks the depth and format to be recognized as an authoritative source by AI models.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Enhance existing content with conversational, long-tail queries related to HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Missing Service schema for detailed service listings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair Denver' or 'best AC installation Denver'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content with FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by creating detailed, authoritative content on topics like 'energy-efficient HVAC systems' and 'maintenance tips for HVAC systems.'

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current site content lacks FAQ schema and conversational depth, causing AI models to overlook the business in relevant queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position as the go-to HVAC provider in Denver.

email_subject_line: Dominate AI Search: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Seen
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search platforms.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
